questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}0, & x<0 \\ \frac{1}{2}, & 0 \leq x<1 \\ 1-e^{-x}, & x \geq 1\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$P\{X=1\}=($ ).
иӢ?$P\{c<\xi \leq b\}=0.1, P\{c<\xi \leq d\}=0.3, P\{a<\xi \leq b\}=0.4$, еҲ?$P\{a<\xi \leq d\}=()$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұеҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮи®Ўз®—еј?$P\{\alpha<X \leq \beta\}=F(\beta)-F(\alpha)$ жңү
$$
\begin{aligned}
& P\{c<\xi \leq b\}=F(b)-F(c)=0.1, \\
& P\{c<\xi \leq d\}=F(d)-F(c)=0.3, \\
& P\{a<\xi \leq b\}=F(b)-F(a)=0.4,
\end{aligned}
$$

еҲҷ
$$
\begin{aligned}
& P\{a<\xi \leq d\}=F(d)-F(a) \\
& =[F(d)-F(c)]+[F(c)-F(b)]+[F(b)-F(a)] \\
& =0.3-0.1+0.4=0.6
\end{aligned}
$$

questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$\xi$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}1-\frac{k^2 x^2+2 k x+2}{2} e^{-k x}, & x \geq 0 \\ 0, & x<0\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$P\left\{-\frac{1}{k} \leq \xi \leq \frac{1}{k}\right\}=()$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұеҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°зҡ„жҖ§иҙЁ $F(+\infty)=1$ еҫ—
$$
\begin{gathered}
\lim _{x \rightarrow+\infty}\left(1-\frac{k^2 x^2+2 k x+2}{2} e^{-k x}\right)=1 \Rightarrow k>0 . \\
\text { ж•?} P\left\{-\frac{1}{k} \leq \xi \leq \frac{1}{k}\right\}=F\left(\frac{1}{k}\right)-F\left(-\frac{1}{k}\right)=F\left(\frac{1}{k}\right)-0=F\left(\frac{1}{k}\right)=1-\frac{5}{2} e^{-1} .
\end{gathered}
$$

questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}1-e^{-2 x}, & x \geq 0 \\ 0, & x<0\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$P\{-3<X \leq 4\}=()$.
и®ҫиҝһз»ӯйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•?$F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}0, & x<0 \\ A x^2, & 0 \leq x \leq 2 \\ 1, & x>2\end{array}\right.$, е…¶дёӯ $A$ дёәеҫ…е®ҡеёёж•? еҲҷжңү $P\{1<x<3\}=()$.
questions.analysis:
е…ҲзЎ®е®ҡеёёж•?$A$, з”ұеҲҶеёғеҮҪж•?$F(x)$ зҡ„еҸіиҝһз»ӯжҖ? жңү
$$
\lim _{x \rightarrow 2^{+}} F(x)=F(2) \Rightarrow 4 A=1 \Rightarrow A=\frac{1}{4} .
$$

еҸҲзӮ№ $x=1, x=3$ йғҪжҳҜ $F(x)$ зҡ„иҝһз»ӯзӮ№, ж•…
$$
P\{1<x<3\}=F(3)-F(1)=1-\frac{1}{4}=\frac{3}{4} .
$$

questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$\xi$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}0, & x<0 \\ \frac{x^2}{2}, & 0 \leq x<1 \\ -\frac{x^2}{2}+2 x-1, & 1 \leq x<2 \\ 1, & x \geq 2\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$P\left\{\frac{1}{2}<\xi<2\right\}$ еҖјдёә ( ).
questions.analysis:
йҰ–е…Ҳи®Ўз®— $P\{\xi=2\}=F(2)-\lim _{x \rightarrow 2^-} F(x)=1-1=0$, жүҖд»Ҙ
$$
P\left\{\frac{1}{2}<\xi<2\right\}=P\left\{\frac{1}{2}<\xi \leq 2\right\} .
$$
з”ұиҝһз»ӯйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸзҡ„жҰӮзҺҮи®Ўз®— $P\{a<X \leq b\}=F(b)-F(a)$ еҫ—
$$
P\left\{\frac{1}{2}<\xi<2\right\}=P\left\{\frac{1}{2}<\xi \leq 2\right\}=F(2)-F\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)=\frac{7}{8} .
$$

questions.question: и®ҫиҝһз»ӯеһӢйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}A+B e^{-2 x}, x>0 \\ 0, \quad x \leq 0\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$A, B$ зҡ„еҖјд»ҘеҸ?$P\{-1<X<1\}$ еҲҶеҲ«дё?( ).

и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•?$F(x)$ дёә
$$ F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{ll} 0, & x<0 \\ A \sin x, & 0 \leq x \leq \pi / 2 \\ 1, & x>\pi / 2 \end{array}\right. $$
еҲ?$A=(\quad)$, $P\{|X|<\pi / 6\}=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұеҲҶеёғеҮҪж•?$F(x)$ зҡ„еҸіиҝһз»ӯжҖ? жңү
$$
F\left(\frac{\pi}{2}+0\right)=F\left(\frac{\pi}{2}\right) \Rightarrow A=1
$$

еӣ?$F(x)$ ең?$x=\frac{\pi}{6}$ еӨ„иҝһз»? ж•?$P\left\{X=\frac{\pi}{6}\right\}=0$, дәҺжҳҜжңү
$$
\begin{aligned}
P\left\{|X|<\frac{\pi}{6}\right\}= & P\left\{-\frac{\pi}{6}<X<\frac{\pi}{6}\right\} \\
& =P\left\{-\frac{\pi}{6}<X \leq \frac{\pi}{6}\right\}=F\left(\frac{\pi}{6}\right)-F\left(-\frac{\pi}{6}\right)=\frac{1}{2}
\end{aligned}
$$

questions.question: е·ІзҹҘйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $\xi$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}0, & x<0 \\ x^2, & 0 \leq x<1 \\ 1, & x \geq 1\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$P\{0.2<\xi<0.4\}=()$.
и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=A+B \arctan x(-\infty<x<+\infty)$, еҲҷзі»ж•?$A$ дё?$B$ д»ҘеҸҠ $X$ иҗҪеңЁ $(-1,1]$ еҶ…зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҲҶеҲ«дё?( ).
